heading: (intro)
raw: Directed by Spike Lee. Written by Spike Lee and Arnold Perl, based on The Autobiography of Malcolm X by Alex Haley.
clean: Directed by Spike Lee. Written by Spike Lee and Arnold Perl, based on The Autobiography of Malcolm X by Alex Haley.

heading: Malcolm X
raw: Like every hustler I was trapped. Cats that hung out together trying to find a solution found nothing. Cats that might have proved space or cured cancer, West Indian Archie might have been a mathematical genius... but we were all victims of the American social order.
clean: Like every hustler I was trapped. Cats that hung out together trying to find a solution found nothing. Cats that might have proved space or cured cancer, West Indian Archie might have been a mathematical genius... but we were all victims of the American social order.

heading: Malcolm X
raw: We had the best organization a black man's ever had. Niggers ruined it.
clean: We had the best organization a black man's ever had. Niggers ruined it.

heading: Malcolm X
raw: The only thing I like integrated is my coffee.
clean: The only thing I like integrated is my coffee.

heading: Malcolm X
raw: We didn't land on Plymouth Rock. Plymouth Rock landed on us!
clean: We didn't land on Plymouth Rock. Plymouth Rock landed on us!

heading: Elijah Muhammad
raw: You will be on the public eye. Beware on them cameras. Oh, them cameras are bad as any narcotic.
clean: You will be on the public eye. Beware on them cameras. Oh, them cameras are bad as any narcotic.

heading: Brother Baines
raw: A man curses because he doesn't have the words to say what's on his mind.
clean: A man curses because he doesn't have the words to say what's on his mind.

heading: Brother Baines
raw: A Muslim must be strikingly upright; an outstanding example so that those in the darkness can see the power of the light.
clean: A Muslim must be strikingly upright; an outstanding example so that those in the darkness can see the power of the light.

heading: Others
raw: Captain Green: [Witnessing Malcolm's control over a mob] That's too much power for one man to have.
clean: That's too much power for one man to have.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Malcolm X: [about the disciples of Christ] What color were they?
clean: What color were they?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chaplain Gill: Well, I don't think we know that for certain.
clean: Well, I don't think we know that for certain.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Malcolm X: But they were Hebrews, were they not?
clean: But they were Hebrews, were they not?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chaplain Gill: That's right.
clean: That's right.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Malcolm X: As was Jesus. Jesus was also a Hebrew.
clean: As was Jesus. Jesus was also a Hebrew.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chaplain Gill: Why don't you just ask your question.
clean: Why don't you just ask your question.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Malcolm X: What color were the original Hebrews?
clean: What color were the original Hebrews?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chaplain Gill: I have told you that we don't know that for certain.
clean: I have told you that we don't know that for certain.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Malcolm X: Then you can't believe for certain that Jesus was white.
clean: Then you can't believe for certain that Jesus was white.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chaplain Gill: Just... Just a moment. Just a moment. God is white. [pointing to a painting of a white Jesus hanging on the wall] Isn't it obvious?
clean: Just... Just a moment. Just a moment. God is white. Isn't it obvious?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chaplain Gill: Now just... just what are you saying?
clean: Now just... just what are you saying?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Malcolm X: I'm not saying anything; I'm proving to you that Jesus was not, and I might quote one of my Indian brothers, he was not a pale-face.
clean: I'm not saying anything; I'm proving to you that Jesus was not, and I might quote one of my Indian brothers, he was not a pale-face.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chaplain Gill: [pensively] Uh-huh.
clean: Uh-huh.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Malcolm X: Amen.
clean: Amen.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Chaplain Gill: Isn't that interesting.
clean: Isn't that interesting.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Coed: Mr. X, I've read some of your speeches and I honestly believe a lot of what you say has truth to it. I have a good heart. I'm a good person despite my whiteness. What can the good white people like myself, who are not prejudiced, or racist, what can we do to help the cause?
clean: Mr. X, I've read some of your speeches and I honestly believe a lot of what you say has truth to it. I have a good heart. I'm a good person despite my whiteness. What can the good white people like myself, who are not prejudiced, or racist, what can we do to help the cause?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Malcolm X: Nothing.
clean: Nothing.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Report #1: Malcolm, you said on your trip abroad you sensed a feeling of great brotherhood.
clean: Report #1: Malcolm, you said on your trip abroad you sensed a feeling of great brotherhood.

heading: Dialogue
raw: Reporter #8: Malcolm, are you prepared to go to the United Nations at this point and ask that charges be brought against the United States for its treatment of the American Negroes?
clean: Reporter #8: Malcolm, are you prepared to go to the United Nations at this point and ask that charges be brought against the United States for its treatment of the American Negroes?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Reporter #2: One of your more controversial remarks was a call for black people to get rifles and form rifle clubs sometime back. Do you still favor that for self-defense?
clean: Reporter #2: One of your more controversial remarks was a call for black people to get rifles and form rifle clubs sometime back. Do you still favor that for self-defense?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Reporter #2: What about the guns, Malcolm?
clean: Reporter #2: What about the guns, Malcolm?

heading: Dialogue
raw: Malcolm X: Has the white man changed since I went away? Have you put up your guns? The day you stop being violent against my people will be the day I tell folks to put away their guns.
clean: Has the white man changed since I went away? Have you put up your guns? The day you stop being violent against my people will be the day I tell folks to put away their guns.
